topStories.title: For Trump, a Promised Economic Boom Collides With the Costs of War
topStories.description: President Trump had envisioned a growing economy and improving fortunes for American families in 2026. That appears at risk in his war with Iran.

topStories.title: Pentagon Names 6 Military Members Killed in Iraq Tanker Crash
topStories.description: The crew members had been part of the U.S. and Israel’s war on Iran, bringing the death toll of American service members in the conflict to at least 13.

topStories.title: F.C.C. Chair Threatens to Revoke Broadcasters’ Licenses Over War Coverage
topStories.description: The comment from Brendan Carr came on the heels of a social media message from President Trump criticizing the news media’s coverage of the war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: BJP accused of attempting to poach Odisha Congress legislators
Bypolls to Davangere South and Bagalkot to be held on April 9; counting on May 4
dailyNews.description: Both ruling Congress and Opposition BJP are facing tough competition among their prospective candidates, and both parties are left with little over a week to decide on their nominees

dailyNews.title: 'Protect Territory To Protect Identity': Sarbananda Sonowal To NDTV
dailyNews.description: Union Minister Sarbananda Sonowal gave a long list of work that the BJP government in Assam has done in the last 11 years, and compared them with what the Congress did.

dailyNews.title: Lupin bets on complex generics, biosimilars to power next US growth phase - Business Standard
dailyNews.description: Lupin bets on complex generics, biosimilars to power next US growth phase  Business Standard

dailyNews.title: Trump's personal number is up for sale, report says - and CEOs, crypto investors are paying to get it
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump's personal mobile number has become Washington DC's most traded commodity, with CEOs offering cash and crypto investors offering cryptocurrency to obtain it, according to an investigation by The Atlantic.

dailyNews.title: Rahul Gandhi writes to PM Modi, seeks Bharat Ratna for BSP founder Kanshi Ram: ‘Deeply felt’
dailyNews.description: Congress leader Rahul Gandhi's letter came as the nation commemorated Kanshi Ram's birth anniversary on Sunday, March 15.

dailyNews.title: Rahul Gandhi demands Bharat Ratna for Kanshi Ram, writes to PM Modi as Dalit outreach peaks ahead of UP polls
dailyNews.description: Move comes as part of Congress outreach to Dalits and other socially backward sections ahead of Uttar Pradesh elections due within a year

dailyNews.title: US names six crew killed in refuelling plane crash in Iraq
dailyNews.description: The aircraft was on a combat mission as part of ongoing US operations against Iran when it crashed in western Iraq on Thursday.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day by American poet Robert Frost: ‘I took the one less traveled by…’
dailyNews.description: Robert Frost's famous lines about choosing the unconventional path resonate in today's world, where social media trends dictate lifestyles. The poem emphasizes that choices shape our identity.

dailyNews.description: President Trump had envisioned a growing economy and improving fortunes for American families in 2026. That appears at risk in his war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon Names 6 Military Members Killed in Iraq Tanker Crash
dailyNews.description: The crew members had been part of the U.S. and Israel’s war on Iran, bringing the death toll of American service members in the conflict to at least 13.

dailyNews.title: F.C.C. Chair Threatens to Revoke Broadcasters’ Licenses Over War Coverage
dailyNews.description: The comment from Brendan Carr came on the heels of a social media message from President Trump criticizing the news media’s coverage of the war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: The Billionaire Backlash Against a Philanthropic Dream
dailyNews.description: The Giving Pledge, once trendy among the world’s richest, has come upon hard times.

dailyNews.title: It’s Good to Be a Billionaire, Even at Tax Time
dailyNews.description: Paying taxes would feel better if the truly rich were bearing a fair share, our columnist says.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Turns to Migrant Workers to Help Farm Labor Shortage
dailyNews.description: As the president’s immigration policies squeeze an already tight supply of farm labor, the Trump administration is making it cheaper to hire foreign farmworkers.

dailyNews.title: A Refugee Died After Border Patrol Left Him at a Cafe. Fear Followed.
dailyNews.description: Buffalo’s Arakan Rohingya community was rattled after a disabled man’s death. “Our worry comes from future incidents that may happen,” one resident said.

dailyNews.title: In Scolding the New U.S. Ambassador, South Africa Signals Defiance
dailyNews.description: The latest clash between the two countries illustrates the depths to which relations have sunk and the struggle to forge a new path forward.

dailyNews.title: In Texas, an Unyielding Gun Culture Jumps Off YouTube and Into Politics
dailyNews.description: Brandon Herrera, a Republican candidate for Congress, built a large online fan base as a “guntuber.”

dailyNews.title: What to Watch for at the 2026 Oscars: Best Actor Race, Conan O’Brien and More
dailyNews.description: It will be a tight race for best picture and actor, while the In Memoriam segment looks to be supersized this year.

dailyNews.title: The $500 Million Mystery Will, Signed by Ghosts
dailyNews.description: A seven-page document, mailed by an elusive figure, has set off a court battle over the estate of Tony Hsieh, the former chief executive of Zappos.

dailyNews.title: How Minnesota Beat Trump
dailyNews.description: Moms donating their breast milk to strangers, dads taking someone else’s kids to school: Minnesotans showed a basic human impulse to look out for their neighbors.

dailyNews.title: What Trump Didn’t Know About Iran
dailyNews.description: Ali Vaez, the Iran project director at the International Crisis Group, explains the history of miscalculations that led to the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Commuters, Rejoice! The New Portal Bridge in New Jersey Is Ready for Riders.
dailyNews.description: The old Portal Bridge disrupted rail commutes in New Jersey for decades, frequently getting stuck when it swung to let boat traffic pass. Now a new bridge is open to the public.

dailyNews.title: Some Olympic Leaders Want to See Fixed Winter Games Host Cities
dailyNews.description: Fewer cities are bidding for Olympics, and those that are can’t always accommodate every event. The Milan-Cortina Games were the most sprawling Olympics in history.

topStories.title: Ben Shapiro praises Trump’s Iran strikes as ‘single bravest foreign policy move of my lifetime’
topStories.description: Ben Shapiro calls Trump's Iran strategy "the single bravest foreign policy move" of his lifetime, praising bold reassertion of American authority on the world stage.

topStories.title: Anti-Trump Oscar nominees abound as ceremony looks to navigate fraught political scene
topStories.description: This year's Oscar nominees include several outspoken anti-Trump figures, as host Conan O'Brien acknowledged this week it could be a delicate dance at Hollywood's big night.

topStories.title: Trump seeks warships from other countries to help secure Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: Trump calls for international warships to secure Strait of Hormuz as Iran allegedly threatens global oil shipping routes from the Middle East region.

topStories.title: Trump says he's not ready to make a deal with Iran as Gulf countries report new attacks
topStories.description: The war, which shows no signs of ending soon, has upended global air travel, disrupted oil exports from the region and sent fuel prices rising across the world.

topStories.title: Ukraine waiting on U.S. and Russia to agree on next round of peace talks
topStories.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy says he is ready for the next trilateral peace talks with the U.S. and Russia, but the meeting depends on Washington and Moscow.

topStories.title: U.S. intel shows Iran's late leader was wary of son in power, sources say
topStories.description: U.S. intelligence has circulated to President Trump's inner circle that Iran's late supreme leader had misgivings about his son replacing him, viewing Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei as not very bright.

dailyNews.description: U.S. intelligence has circulated to President Trump's inner circle that Iran's late supreme leader had misgivings about his son replacing him, viewing Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei as not very bright.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: FCC chair slams broadcasters after Trump disputes reports on Iran-damaged U.S. tankers
dailyNews.description: FCC Chair Brendan Carr blasted broadcasters shortly after President Donald Trump called reports that Iran struck five U.S. tanker planes "fake news."

dailyNews.title: Trump says he thinks Russian leader Putin is helping Iran in war
dailyNews.description: Russian leaders told President Trump they aren't sharing intelligence with Iran as it fights the U.S. and Israel, special envoy Steve Witkoff said this week.

dailyNews.title: Did tariff dividend checks just become more likely? Economists weigh in
dailyNews.description: Months after President Donald Trump suggested sending Americans a $2,000 tariff dividend check, there's a chance households could see that stimulus in 2026.

dailyNews.title: Exclusive: Trump says Iran is ready to make a deal but ‘the terms aren’t good enough yet’
dailyNews.description: In a phone call with Meet the Press moderator Kristen Welker, President Trump says Iran had been “defeated militarily” and was ready to make a deal but “the terms aren’t good enough yet,” declining to say what those terms are. He also said Iran’s Kharg Island, home to a critical oil terminal for the country, had been “decimated,” though he could hit it again “just for fun.”

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran is ready to negotiate a ceasefire but he's not ready to make a deal
dailyNews.description: In a wide-ranging interview, President Donald Trump said he’s not ready to make a deal to end the war with Iran, despite Iran’s willingness to do so.

dailyNews.title: Trump says there’s been ‘total obliteration’ of Iran militarily
dailyNews.description: President Trump told NBC News’ Kristen Welker in a nearly half hour phone conversation that Iran has been “militarily defeated” and he believes other countries will help to secure passage through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'
dailyNews.description: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'

dailyNews.title: Trump calls U.S. operations in Iran 'a little excursion'
dailyNews.description: Trump calls U.S. operations in Iran 'a little excursion'
